title: Playground Object Control Center
concept: A saved-object control center that treats temporary, browser-saved, local-directory, and preview Playgrounds as first-class objects beside a protected live browser and right inspector.
focus: large live browser with right inspector
stateful save, delete, rename, and preview flows
neutral WordPress admin palette with state accents
flows: Delete a saved Playground end to end with warning, cancel, confirm, progress, row removal, transfer history, and active fallback to the temporary site
Preview a Gutenberg PR or branch end to end with route-specific input, validation/loading, resulting preview identity, active path change, and save/export availability
Save a temporary or preview Playground to browser storage or to a local directory with distinct progress copy, saved identity, storage badge, object row, and reload consequences
Manage saved, local, preview, and unsaved objects with open, rename, delete, manager tabs, transfer history, and shell state updates
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, GitHub export, zip download, and database download while the live browser remains visible
Browse a labeled representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery items with categories, search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation, and result states
featureCoverage: WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview route with validation and preview result
GitHub import with account connection and token persistence caveat
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled honestly
Featured blueprint shortcuts and selected blueprint detail
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and browser-backed slug
Save to a local directory with folder permission consequence
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, and preview Playground object list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, delete progress, and row removal
Active path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
Files create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result state
Blueprint editor, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation, and result state
SQLite-backed database path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic notice state
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions
